parameters.query: UPDATE gda_opportunity_tracker SET incumbent_analysis = $1::jsonb, last_refreshed = NOW() WHERE solicitation_number = $2 RETURNING id, solicitation_number, title

SELECT id, solicitation_number, opp_title, agency, dept, naics_code, set_aside, govtribe_id, incumbent_analysis, gda_score, gda_label, estimated_value FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE (id = {{ $json.body.opp_id || 0 }} OR govtribe_id = '{{ $json.body.govtribe_id || '' }}' OR solicitation_number = '{{ $json.body.solicitation_number || '' }}') AND solicitation_number != '' LIMIT 1
UPDATE gda_opportunity_tracker SET incumbent_analysis = $1::jsonb, last_refreshed = NOW() WHERE solicitation_number = $2 RETURNING id, solicitation_number

SELECT id, solicitation_number, opp_title, agency, naics_code, set_aside, gda_score, gda_label, estimated_value, incumbent_analysis, last_refreshed FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE incumbent_analysis IS NOT NULL ORDER BY last_refreshed DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { try { const rows = $input.all().map(function(i){return i.json;}); return JSON.stringify({status:'ok',action:'list',data:rows,count:rows.length}); } catch(e) { return JSON.stringify({status:'ok',action:'list',data:[],count:0,error:e.message}); } })() }}

parameters.query: SELECT id, solicitation_number, opp_title, agency, naics_code, set_aside, estimated_value, gda_score, gda_label, incumbent_analysis FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE (solicitation_number ILIKE '%{{ $json.body.contract_number || '' }}%' OR agency ILIKE '%{{ $json.body.agency || '' }}%') AND (solicitation_number != '' OR '{{ $json.body.contract_number || '' }}' = '') ORDER BY gda_score DESC LIMIT 5
